
<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

---
title: "S0: Prepare Annotated Seurat Object"
output: html_notebook
---

This script prepares the cleaned, annotated Seurat object with:
- Corrected 1/f status
- Manual cell type annotations
- MapMyCells neuron annotations
- Patient metadata

## Setup


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxubGlicmFyeShkcGx5cilcbmxpYnJhcnkoU2V1cmF0KVxubGlicmFyeShnZ3Bsb3QyKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## 1. Load Raw Seurat Object


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuIyBMb2FkIHRoZSBvcmlnaW5hbCBTZXVyYXQgb2JqZWN0XG5vYmogPC0gcmVhZFJEUyhcIkQ6L1lvdXNzZWYgU2liaWgvU2V1cmF0X09iamVjdHMvb25lb3ZlcmZfY29tYmluZWRfc3VibWFwX2NlbGxzX3NuY19zY3RfY29tcGxldGUucmRzXCIpXG5cbiMgUXVpY2sgdmlld1xucHJpbnQocGFzdGUoXCJUb3RhbCBjZWxsczpcIiwgbmNvbChvYmopKSlcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
# Load the original Seurat object
obj <- readRDS("D:/Youssef Sibih/Seurat_Objects/oneoverf_combined_submap_cells_snc_sct_complete.rds")

# Quick view
print(paste("Total cells:", ncol(obj)))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiVG90YWwgY2VsbHM6IDUwODg5OVwiXG4ifQ== -->

```
[1] "Total cells: 508899"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVSR2x0VUd4dmRDaHZZbW9zSUd4aFltVnNJRDBnVkZKVlJTbGNibUJnWUNKOSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxuRGltUGxvdChvYmosIGxhYmVsID0gVFJVRSlcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuRGltUGxvdChvYmosIGxhYmVsID0gVFJVRSlcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
DimPlot(obj, label = TRUE)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-plot-begin eyJoZWlnaHQiOjQzMi42MzI5LCJ3aWR0aCI6NzAwLCJkcGkiOi0xLCJzaXplX2JlaGF2aW9yIjowLCJjb25kaXRpb25zIjpbXX0= -->

<img src="data:image/png;base64," />

<!-- rnb-plot-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## 2. Fix 1/f Status Corrections

The original 1/f status assignments were incorrect for some samples. We need to fix:
- SF490_8 and SF495_6 should be high1overf (currently low1overf)
- SF490_3 and SF495_1 should be low1overf (currently high1overf)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
# Fix samples that should be high1overf
cells_to_update1 <- WhichCells(obj, 
                               expression = exp == "SF490_8" & one_over_f_status == "low1overf")
obj@meta.data[cells_to_update1, "one_over_f_status"] <- "high1overf"
print(paste("Fixed SF490_8:", length(cells_to_update1), "cells -> high1overf"))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiRml4ZWQgU0Y0OTBfODogODUzMCBjZWxscyAtPiBoaWdoMW92ZXJmXCJcbiJ9 -->

```
[1] "Fixed SF490_8: 8530 cells -> high1overf"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
cells_to_update2 <- WhichCells(obj, 
                               expression = exp == "SF495_6" & one_over_f_status == "low1overf")
obj@meta.data[cells_to_update2, "one_over_f_status"] <- "high1overf"
print(paste("Fixed SF495_6:", length(cells_to_update2), "cells -> high1overf"))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiRml4ZWQgU0Y0OTVfNjogNDA0NzUgY2VsbHMgLT4gaGlnaDFvdmVyZlwiXG4ifQ== -->

```
[1] "Fixed SF495_6: 40475 cells -> high1overf"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
# Fix samples that should be low1overf
cells_to_update3 <- WhichCells(obj, 
                               expression = exp == "SF490_3" & one_over_f_status == "high1overf")
obj@meta.data[cells_to_update3, "one_over_f_status"] <- "low1overf"
print(paste("Fixed SF490_3:", length(cells_to_update3), "cells -> low1overf"))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiRml4ZWQgU0Y0OTBfMzogMTkyMDUgY2VsbHMgLT4gbG93MW92ZXJmXCJcbiJ9 -->

```
[1] "Fixed SF490_3: 19205 cells -> low1overf"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
cells_to_update4 <- WhichCells(obj, 
                               expression = exp == "SF495_1" & one_over_f_status == "high1overf")
obj@meta.data[cells_to_update4, "one_over_f_status"] <- "low1overf"
print(paste("Fixed SF495_1:", length(cells_to_update4), "cells -> low1overf"))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiRml4ZWQgU0Y0OTVfMTogMjIyNjIgY2VsbHMgLT4gbG93MW92ZXJmXCJcbiJ9 -->

```
[1] "Fixed SF495_1: 22262 cells -> low1overf"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuIyBWZXJpZnkgdGhlIGZpeFxudGFibGUob2JqQG1ldGEuZGF0YSRleHAsIG9iakBtZXRhLmRhdGEkb25lX292ZXJfZl9zdGF0dXMpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
# Verify the fix
table(obj@meta.data$exp, obj@meta.data$one_over_f_status)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->

```
               
                high1overf low1overf
  SF490_3                0     19205
  SF490_8             8530         0
  SF491_2                0     26789
  SF491_5            19793         0
  SF495_1                0     22262
  SF495_6            40475         0
  SF524_1                0     21441
  SF524_3            34618         0
  SF632_3                0     95431
  SF632_4            81592         0
  SF644_1                0     42559
  SF644_Sample4      30995         0
  SF647_2                0     22653
  SF647_7            42556         0
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## 3. Add Manual Cell Type Annotations

Apply cluster annotations to assign cell types.


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
# Store default cluster identities
obj@meta.data$default_ident <- Idents(obj)

# Define cluster to cell type mapping
cluster_ids <- c(
  "0" = "Tumor",
  "1" = "Oligodendrocyte",
  "2" = "Endothelial",
  "3" = "Oligodendrocyte",
  "4" = "Astrocyte",
  "5" = "Oligodendrocyte",
  "6" = "Neurons",
  "7" = "Myeloid/microglial",
  "8" = "Astrocyte",
  "9" = "Tumor",
  "10" = "Neurons",
  "11" = "Neurons",
  "12" = "Tumor",
  "13" = "Neurons",
  "14" = "Neurons",
  "15" = "Neurons",
  "16" = "Neurons",
  "17" = "Neurons",
  "18" = "Oligodendrocyte",
  "19" = "Tumor",
  "20" = "Oligodendrocyte",
  "21" = "Mesenchymal",
  "22" = "Erythroid",
  "23" = "Oligodendrocyte",
  "24" = "Neurons",
  "25" = "Tumor",
  "26" = "Myeloid",
  "27" = "Neurons",
  "28" = "Tumor",
  "29" = "Oligodendrocyte",
  "30" = "Tumor",
  "31" = "Neurons",
  "32" = "Neurons",
  "33" = "Astrocyte",
  "34" = "Tumor"
)

# Apply annotations
names(cluster_ids) <- levels(obj)
obj <- RenameIdents(obj, cluster_ids)

# Store in manual_anot column
obj$manual_anot <- Idents(obj)

# Verify annotations
print("Cell type counts:")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiQ2VsbCB0eXBlIGNvdW50czpcIlxuIn0= -->

```
[1] "Cell type counts:"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVkR0ZpYkdVb2IySnFKRzFoYm5WaGJGOWhibTkwS1Z4dVlHQmdJbjA9IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG50YWJsZShvYmokbWFudWFsX2Fub3QpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxudGFibGUob2JqJG1hbnVhbF9hbm90KVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
table(obj$manual_anot)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->

```

             Tumor    Oligodendrocyte        Endothelial          Astrocyte            Neurons Myeloid/microglial 
            129935             151133              42254              42295             109871              20388 
       Mesenchymal          Erythroid            Myeloid 
              4991               4538               3494 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuRGltUGxvdChvYmosIGxhYmVsID0gVFJVRSkgKyBnZ3RpdGxlKFwiQ2VsbCBUeXBlIEFubm90YXRpb25zXCIpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
DimPlot(obj, label = TRUE) + ggtitle("Cell Type Annotations")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-plot-begin eyJoZWlnaHQiOjQzMi42MzI5LCJ3aWR0aCI6NzAwLCJkcGkiOi0xLCJzaXplX2JlaGF2aW9yIjowLCJjb25kaXRpb25zIjpbXX0= -->

<img src="data:image/png;base64," />

<!-- rnb-plot-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## 4. Add Cortex Type Metadata


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
# Initialize cortex_type with glioma_subtype values
obj@meta.data$cortex_type <- obj@meta.data$glioma_subtype

# Set Normal Cortex for control samples
obj@meta.data$cortex_type[obj@meta.data$exp %in% c("SF524_3", "SF524_1")] <- "Normal Cortex"

# Verify
print("Cortex type distribution:")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiQ29ydGV4IHR5cGUgZGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uOlwiXG4ifQ== -->

```
[1] "Cortex type distribution:"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVkR0ZpYkdVb2IySnFRRzFsZEdFdVpHRjBZU1JqYjNKMFpYaGZkSGx3WlNsY2JtQmdZQ0o5IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG50YWJsZShvYmpAbWV0YS5kYXRhJGNvcnRleF90eXBlKVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxudGFibGUob2JqQG1ldGEuZGF0YSRjb3J0ZXhfdHlwZSlcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
table(obj@meta.data$cortex_type)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG4gICAgICBhc3Ryb2N5dG9tYSAgICAgIGdsaW9ibGFzdG9tYSAgICAgTm9ybWFsIENvcnRleCBvbGlnb2RlbmRyb2dsaW9tYSBcbiAgICAgICAgICAgMTExNzkxICAgICAgICAgICAgIDkwNDcyICAgICAgICAgICAgIDU2MDU5ICAgICAgICAgICAgMjUwNTc3IFxuIn0= -->

```

      astrocytoma      glioblastoma     Normal Cortex oligodendroglioma 
           111791             90472             56059            250577 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## 5. Integrate MapMyCells Annotations

Add MapMyCells neuron subtype annotations (class_name and subclass_name) to the full object.
These will be NA for non-neurons.


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
# Define mapping files for Neurons groups
mapping_files <- list(
  neurons_1 = "C:/YS_Backup/Neurons_1_MTG/neurons_anndata_group1.csv",
  neurons_2 = "C:/YS_Backup/Neurons_2_MTG/neurons_anndata_group2.csv"
)

# Load and combine both annotations
all_mappings <- lapply(mapping_files, function(file) {
  mapping <- read.csv(file, comment.char = "#")
  rownames(mapping) <- mapping$cell_id
  return(mapping[, c("class_name", "subclass_name"), drop = FALSE])
})

# Merge both neuron group mappings
combined_mapping <- bind_rows(all_mappings)

# Find cells that exist in both the object and the mapping
common_cells <- intersect(rownames(obj@meta.data), rownames(combined_mapping))
print(paste("Neurons with MapMyCells annotations:", length(common_cells)))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiTmV1cm9ucyB3aXRoIE1hcE15Q2VsbHMgYW5ub3RhdGlvbnM6IDExMTQwNVwiXG4ifQ== -->

```
[1] "Neurons with MapMyCells annotations: 111405"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
# Initialize columns with NA for all cells
obj@meta.data$class_name <- NA
obj@meta.data$subclass_name <- NA

# Add annotations only for matching cells (neurons)
obj@meta.data[common_cells, "class_name"] <- combined_mapping[common_cells, "class_name"]
obj@meta.data[common_cells, "subclass_name"] <- combined_mapping[common_cells, "subclass_name"]

# Verify
print("Class name distribution (including NA for non-neurons):")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiQ2xhc3MgbmFtZSBkaXN0cmlidXRpb24gKGluY2x1ZGluZyBOQSBmb3Igbm9uLW5ldXJvbnMpOlwiXG4ifQ== -->

```
[1] "Class name distribution (including NA for non-neurons):"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxudGFibGUob2JqQG1ldGEuZGF0YSRjbGFzc19uYW1lLCB1c2VOQSA9IFwiaWZhbnlcIilcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
table(obj@meta.data$class_name, useNA = "ifany")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->

```

        Neuronal: GABAergic     Neuronal: Glutamatergic Non-neuronal and Non-neural                        <NA> 
                      32153                       52857                       26395                      397494 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjSEpwYm5Rb1hDSlRkV0pqYkdGemN5QnVZVzFsSUdScGMzUnlhV0oxZEdsdmJqcGNJaWxjYm1CZ1lDSjkgLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbnByaW50KFwiU3ViY2xhc3MgbmFtZSBkaXN0cmlidXRpb246XCIpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQoXCJTdWJjbGFzcyBuYW1lIGRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvbjpcIilcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
print("Subclass name distribution:")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiU3ViY2xhc3MgbmFtZSBkaXN0cmlidXRpb246XCJcbiJ9 -->

```
[1] "Subclass name distribution:"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxudGFibGUob2JqQG1ldGEuZGF0YSRzdWJjbGFzc19uYW1lLCB1c2VOQSA9IFwiaWZhbnlcIilcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
table(obj@meta.data$subclass_name, useNA = "ifany")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->

```

      Astrocyte      Chandelier     Endothelial         L2/3 IT           L4 IT           L5 ET           L5 IT 
           2657            1620             179           10780           10700             700           12044 
        L5/6 NP           L6 CT           L6 IT      L6 IT Car3             L6b           Lamp5      Lamp5 Lhx6 
           2706            3251            6348            2477            3851            2656            1747 
  Microglia-PVM Oligodendrocyte             OPC            Pax6           Pvalb            Sncg             Sst 
            973           15564            6256             692            8197             807           10084 
      Sst Chodl             Vip            VLMC            <NA> 
            391            5959             766          397494 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## 6. Create Refined Annotations

Create `refined_annot` that combines manual annotations with MapMyCells neuron subtypes:
- Tumor cells keep "Tumor" designation
- Neurons with valid MapMyCells annotations (Glutamatergic or GABAergic) get their subclass_name
- All other cells keep their manual_anot


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
# Start with manual_anot as base
obj@meta.data$refined_annot <- as.character(obj@meta.data$manual_anot)

# For neurons with valid neuronal MapMyCells annotations, use subclass_name
# Valid neuronal classes are "Neuronal: Glutamatergic" and "Neuronal: GABAergic"
valid_neuronal_classes <- c("Neuronal: Glutamatergic", "Neuronal: GABAergic")

# Find cells that are neurons AND have valid neuronal MapMyCells class
neurons_with_valid_mmc <- which(
  obj@meta.data$manual_anot == "Neurons" & 
  obj@meta.data$class_name %in% valid_neuronal_classes &
  !is.na(obj@meta.data$subclass_name)
)

# Update refined_annot for these cells with their subclass_name
obj@meta.data$refined_annot[neurons_with_valid_mmc] <- obj@meta.data$subclass_name[neurons_with_valid_mmc]

# Verify the results
print("Refined annotation distribution:")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiUmVmaW5lZCBhbm5vdGF0aW9uIGRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvbjpcIlxuIn0= -->

```
[1] "Refined annotation distribution:"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQodGFibGUob2JqQG1ldGEuZGF0YSRyZWZpbmVkX2Fubm90LCB1c2VOQSA9IFwiaWZhbnlcIikpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
print(table(obj@meta.data$refined_annot, useNA = "ifany"))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->

```

         Astrocyte         Chandelier        Endothelial          Erythroid            L2/3 IT              L4 IT 
             42295               1620              42254               4538              10746              10675 
             L5 ET              L5 IT            L5/6 NP              L6 CT              L6 IT         L6 IT Car3 
               689              12007               2705               3243               6339               2474 
               L6b              Lamp5         Lamp5 Lhx6        Mesenchymal            Myeloid Myeloid/microglial 
              3845               2650               1746               4991               3494              20388 
           Neurons    Oligodendrocyte               Pax6              Pvalb               Sncg                Sst 
             25046             151133                689               8175                805              10073 
         Sst Chodl              Tumor                Vip 
               389             129935               5955 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuIyBDaGVjayB0aGF0IFR1bW9yIGlzIHByZXNlcnZlZFxucHJpbnQocGFzdGUoXCJcXG5UdW1vciBjZWxscyBpbiByZWZpbmVkX2Fubm90OlwiLCBzdW0ob2JqQG1ldGEuZGF0YSRyZWZpbmVkX2Fubm90ID09IFwiVHVtb3JcIikpKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
# Check that Tumor is preserved
print(paste("\nTumor cells in refined_annot:", sum(obj@meta.data$refined_annot == "Tumor")))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiXFxuVHVtb3IgY2VsbHMgaW4gcmVmaW5lZF9hbm5vdDogMTI5OTM1XCJcbiJ9 -->

```
[1] "\nTumor cells in refined_annot: 129935"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQocGFzdGUoXCJUdW1vciBjZWxscyBpbiBtYW51YWxfYW5vdDpcIiwgc3VtKG9iakBtZXRhLmRhdGEkbWFudWFsX2Fub3QgPT0gXCJUdW1vclwiKSkpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
print(paste("Tumor cells in manual_anot:", sum(obj@meta.data$manual_anot == "Tumor")))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiVHVtb3IgY2VsbHMgaW4gbWFudWFsX2Fub3Q6IDEyOTkzNVwiXG4ifQ== -->

```
[1] "Tumor cells in manual_anot: 129935"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuIyBDaGVjayBuZXVyb25zIGJyZWFrZG93blxucHJpbnQoXCJcXG5OZXVyb25zIGJyZWFrZG93bjpcIilcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
# Check neurons breakdown
print("\nNeurons breakdown:")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiXFxuTmV1cm9ucyBicmVha2Rvd246XCJcbiJ9 -->

```
[1] "\nNeurons breakdown:"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQocGFzdGUoXCIgIC0gT3JpZ2luYWwgJ05ldXJvbnMnIGluIG1hbnVhbF9hbm90OlwiLCBzdW0ob2JqQG1ldGEuZGF0YSRtYW51YWxfYW5vdCA9PSBcIk5ldXJvbnNcIikpKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
print(paste("  - Original 'Neurons' in manual_anot:", sum(obj@meta.data$manual_anot == "Neurons")))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiICAtIE9yaWdpbmFsICdOZXVyb25zJyBpbiBtYW51YWxfYW5vdDogMTA5ODcxXCJcbiJ9 -->

```
[1] "  - Original 'Neurons' in manual_anot: 109871"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQocGFzdGUoXCIgIC0gTmV1cm9ucyB3aXRoIHZhbGlkIE1hcE15Q2VsbHMgc3ViY2xhc3M6XCIsIGxlbmd0aChuZXVyb25zX3dpdGhfdmFsaWRfbW1jKSkpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
print(paste("  - Neurons with valid MapMyCells subclass:", length(neurons_with_valid_mmc)))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiICAtIE5ldXJvbnMgd2l0aCB2YWxpZCBNYXBNeUNlbGxzIHN1YmNsYXNzOiA4NDgyNVwiXG4ifQ== -->

```
[1] "  - Neurons with valid MapMyCells subclass: 84825"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQocGFzdGUoXCIgIC0gTmV1cm9ucyByZW1haW5pbmcgYXMgJ05ldXJvbnMnIGluIHJlZmluZWRfYW5ub3Q6XCIsIHN1bShvYmpAbWV0YS5kYXRhJHJlZmluZWRfYW5ub3QgPT0gXCJOZXVyb25zXCIpKSlcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
print(paste("  - Neurons remaining as 'Neurons' in refined_annot:", sum(obj@meta.data$refined_annot == "Neurons")))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiICAtIE5ldXJvbnMgcmVtYWluaW5nIGFzICdOZXVyb25zJyBpbiByZWZpbmVkX2Fubm90OiAyNTA0NlwiXG4ifQ== -->

```
[1] "  - Neurons remaining as 'Neurons' in refined_annot: 25046"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## 7. Add Patient Metadata

Extract patient ID from sample names (e.g., SF490_8 -> SF490).


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuIyBFeHRyYWN0IHBhdGllbnQgSUQgZnJvbSBleHAgZmllbGRcbm9iakBtZXRhLmRhdGEkcGF0aWVudF9pZCA8LSBnc3ViKFwiX1xcXFxkKyRcIiwgXCJcIiwgb2JqQG1ldGEuZGF0YSRleHApXG5cbiMgVmVyaWZ5XG5wcmludChcIlBhdGllbnQgSUQgZGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uOlwiKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
# Extract patient ID from exp field
obj@meta.data$patient_id <- gsub("_\\d+$", "", obj@meta.data$exp)

# Verify
print("Patient ID distribution:")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiUGF0aWVudCBJRCBkaXN0cmlidXRpb246XCJcbiJ9 -->

```
[1] "Patient ID distribution:"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVkR0ZpYkdVb2IySnFRRzFsZEdFdVpHRjBZU1J3WVhScFpXNTBYMmxrS1Z4dVlHQmdJbjA9IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG50YWJsZShvYmpAbWV0YS5kYXRhJHBhdGllbnRfaWQpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxudGFibGUob2JqQG1ldGEuZGF0YSRwYXRpZW50X2lkKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
table(obj@meta.data$patient_id)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->

```

        SF490         SF491         SF495         SF524         SF632         SF644 SF644_Sample4         SF647 
        27735         46582         62737         56059        177023         42559         30995         65209 
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
# Show sample to patient mapping
sample_patient_mapping <- unique(obj@meta.data[, c("exp", "patient_id", "one_over_f_status")])
sample_patient_mapping <- sample_patient_mapping[order(sample_patient_mapping$patient_id, 
                                                        sample_patient_mapping$one_over_f_status), ]
print("Sample to Patient mapping:")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiU2FtcGxlIHRvIFBhdGllbnQgbWFwcGluZzpcIlxuIn0= -->

```
[1] "Sample to Patient mapping:"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjSEpwYm5Rb2MyRnRjR3hsWDNCaGRHbGxiblJmYldGd2NHbHVaeWxjYm1CZ1lDSjkgLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbnByaW50KHNhbXBsZV9wYXRpZW50X21hcHBpbmcpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQoc2FtcGxlX3BhdGllbnRfbWFwcGluZylcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
print(sample_patient_mapping)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":[""],"name":["_rn_"],"type":[""],"align":["left"]},{"label":["exp"],"name":[1],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["patient_id"],"name":[2],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["one_over_f_status"],"name":[3],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]}],"data":[{"1":"SF490_8","2":"SF490","3":"high1overf","_rn_":"SF490_8_AAACCAAAGGGGATAT-1"},{"1":"SF490_3","2":"SF490","3":"low1overf","_rn_":"SF490_3_AAACCAAAGAACGGTG-1"},{"1":"SF491_5","2":"SF491","3":"high1overf","_rn_":"SF491_5_AAACCAAAGATAGGCG-1"},{"1":"SF491_2","2":"SF491","3":"low1overf","_rn_":"SF491_2_AAACCAAAGAAGGGAA-1"},{"1":"SF495_6","2":"SF495","3":"high1overf","_rn_":"SF495_6_AAACCAAAGCCGCGTA-1"},{"1":"SF495_1","2":"SF495","3":"low1overf","_rn_":"SF495_1_AAACCAAAGCATATAC-1"},{"1":"SF524_3","2":"SF524","3":"high1overf","_rn_":"SF524_3_AAACCAAAGAAGCGCA-1"},{"1":"SF524_1","2":"SF524","3":"low1overf","_rn_":"SF524_1_AAACCAAAGTAACCTG-1"},{"1":"SF632_4","2":"SF632","3":"high1overf","_rn_":"SF632_4_AAACCAAAGAAGCTCC-1"},{"1":"SF632_3","2":"SF632","3":"low1overf","_rn_":"SF632_3_AAACCAAAGAACGAGT-1"},{"1":"SF644_1","2":"SF644","3":"low1overf","_rn_":"SF644_1_AAACCAAAGATTGCCA-1"},{"1":"SF644_Sample4","2":"SF644_Sample4","3":"high1overf","_rn_":"SF644_Sample4_AAACCAAAGAATCGCC-1"},{"1":"SF647_7","2":"SF647","3":"high1overf","_rn_":"SF647_7_AAACCAAAGCATTGAT-1"},{"1":"SF647_2","2":"SF647","3":"low1overf","_rn_":"SF647_2_AAACCAAAGATTGGTT-1"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[3]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[14]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>
</div>

<!-- rnb-frame-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## 8. Final Verification


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuIyBTdW1tYXJ5IG9mIG1ldGFkYXRhIGNvbHVtbnNcbnByaW50KFwiTWV0YWRhdGEgY29sdW1uczpcIilcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
# Summary of metadata columns
print("Metadata columns:")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiTWV0YWRhdGEgY29sdW1uczpcIlxuIn0= -->

```
[1] "Metadata columns:"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjSEpwYm5Rb1kyOXNibUZ0WlhNb2IySnFRRzFsZEdFdVpHRjBZU2twWEc1Z1lHQWlmUT09IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5wcmludChjb2xuYW1lcyhvYmpAbWV0YS5kYXRhKSlcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQoY29sbmFtZXMob2JqQG1ldGEuZGF0YSkpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
print(colnames(obj@meta.data))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->

```
 [1] "orig.ident"        "nCount_RNA"        "nFeature_RNA"      "percent.mt"        "nCount_SCT"        "nFeature_SCT"     
 [7] "exp"               "glioma_subtype"    "one_over_f_status" "SCT_snn_res.0.4"   "seurat_clusters"   "default_ident"    
[13] "manual_anot"       "cortex_type"       "class_name"        "subclass_name"     "refined_annot"     "patient_id"       
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVJeUJUZFcxdFlYSjVJR052ZFc1MGMxeHVjSEpwYm5Rb1hDSlRkVzF0WVhKNU9sd2lLVnh1WUdCZ0luMD0gLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbiMgU3VtbWFyeSBjb3VudHNcbnByaW50KFwiU3VtbWFyeTpcIilcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuIyBTdW1tYXJ5IGNvdW50c1xucHJpbnQoXCJTdW1tYXJ5OlwiKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
# Summary counts
print("Summary:")
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiU3VtbWFyeTpcIlxuIn0= -->

```
[1] "Summary:"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjSEpwYm5Rb2NHRnpkR1VvWENKVWIzUmhiQ0JqWld4c2N6cGNJaXdnYm1OdmJDaHZZbW9wS1NsY2JtQmdZQ0o5IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5wcmludChwYXN0ZShcIlRvdGFsIGNlbGxzOlwiLCBuY29sKG9iaikpKVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQocGFzdGUoXCJUb3RhbCBjZWxsczpcIiwgbmNvbChvYmopKSlcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
print(paste("Total cells:", ncol(obj)))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiVG90YWwgY2VsbHM6IDUwODg5OVwiXG4ifQ== -->

```
[1] "Total cells: 508899"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQocGFzdGUoXCJTYW1wbGVzOlwiLCBsZW5ndGgodW5pcXVlKG9iakBtZXRhLmRhdGEkZXhwKSkpKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
print(paste("Samples:", length(unique(obj@meta.data$exp))))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiU2FtcGxlczogMTRcIlxuIn0= -->

```
[1] "Samples: 14"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQocGFzdGUoXCJQYXRpZW50czpcIiwgbGVuZ3RoKHVuaXF1ZShvYmpAbWV0YS5kYXRhJHBhdGllbnRfaWQpKSkpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
print(paste("Patients:", length(unique(obj@meta.data$patient_id))))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiUGF0aWVudHM6IDhcIlxuIn0= -->

```
[1] "Patients: 8"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQocGFzdGUoXCJIaWdoIDEvZiBjZWxsczpcIiwgc3VtKG9iakBtZXRhLmRhdGEkb25lX292ZXJfZl9zdGF0dXMgPT0gXCJoaWdoMW92ZXJmXCIpKSlcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
print(paste("High 1/f cells:", sum(obj@meta.data$one_over_f_status == "high1overf")))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiSGlnaCAxL2YgY2VsbHM6IDI1ODU1OVwiXG4ifQ== -->

```
[1] "High 1/f cells: 258559"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQocGFzdGUoXCJMb3cgMS9mIGNlbGxzOlwiLCBzdW0ob2JqQG1ldGEuZGF0YSRvbmVfb3Zlcl9mX3N0YXR1cyA9PSBcImxvdzFvdmVyZlwiKSkpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
print(paste("Low 1/f cells:", sum(obj@meta.data$one_over_f_status == "low1overf")))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiTG93IDEvZiBjZWxsczogMjUwMzQwXCJcbiJ9 -->

```
[1] "Low 1/f cells: 250340"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQocGFzdGUoXCJOZXVyb25zIHdpdGggc3ViY2xhc3MgYW5ub3RhdGlvbnM6XCIsIHN1bSghaXMubmEob2JqQG1ldGEuZGF0YSRzdWJjbGFzc19uYW1lKSkpKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
print(paste("Neurons with subclass annotations:", sum(!is.na(obj@meta.data$subclass_name))))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiTmV1cm9ucyB3aXRoIHN1YmNsYXNzIGFubm90YXRpb25zOiAxMTE0MDVcIlxuIn0= -->

```
[1] "Neurons with subclass annotations: 111405"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuIyBWaWV3IHNhbXBsZSBvZiBtZXRhZGF0YVxuaGVhZChvYmpAbWV0YS5kYXRhWywgYyhcImV4cFwiLCBcInBhdGllbnRfaWRcIiwgXCJvbmVfb3Zlcl9mX3N0YXR1c1wiLCBcIm1hbnVhbF9hbm90XCIsIFwicmVmaW5lZF9hbm5vdFwiLCBcImNsYXNzX25hbWVcIiwgXCJzdWJjbGFzc19uYW1lXCIsIFwiY29ydGV4X3R5cGVcIildKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
# View sample of metadata
head(obj@meta.data[, c("exp", "patient_id", "one_over_f_status", "manual_anot", "refined_annot", "class_name", "subclass_name", "cortex_type")])
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-frame-begin  -->

<div data-pagedtable="false">
  <script data-pagedtable-source type="application/json">
{"columns":[{"label":[""],"name":["_rn_"],"type":[""],"align":["left"]},{"label":["exp"],"name":[1],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["patient_id"],"name":[2],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["one_over_f_status"],"name":[3],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["manual_anot"],"name":[4],"type":["fctr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["refined_annot"],"name":[5],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["class_name"],"name":[6],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["subclass_name"],"name":[7],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]},{"label":["cortex_type"],"name":[8],"type":["chr"],"align":["left"]}],"data":[{"1":"SF632_4","2":"SF632","3":"high1overf","4":"Oligodendrocyte","5":"Oligodendrocyte","6":"NA","7":"NA","8":"oligodendroglioma","_rn_":"SF632_4_AAACCAAAGAAGCTCC-1"},{"1":"SF632_4","2":"SF632","3":"high1overf","4":"Neurons","5":"L2/3 IT","6":"Neuronal: Glutamatergic","7":"L2/3 IT","8":"oligodendroglioma","_rn_":"SF632_4_AAACCAAAGAAGGAGA-1"},{"1":"SF632_4","2":"SF632","3":"high1overf","4":"Tumor","5":"Tumor","6":"NA","7":"NA","8":"oligodendroglioma","_rn_":"SF632_4_AAACCAAAGAATCACT-1"},{"1":"SF632_4","2":"SF632","3":"high1overf","4":"Endothelial","5":"Endothelial","6":"NA","7":"NA","8":"oligodendroglioma","_rn_":"SF632_4_AAACCAAAGAATCATC-1"},{"1":"SF632_4","2":"SF632","3":"high1overf","4":"Neurons","5":"Vip","6":"Neuronal: GABAergic","7":"Vip","8":"oligodendroglioma","_rn_":"SF632_4_AAACCAAAGCATTACG-1"},{"1":"SF632_4","2":"SF632","3":"high1overf","4":"Tumor","5":"Tumor","6":"NA","7":"NA","8":"oligodendroglioma","_rn_":"SF632_4_AAACCAAAGCCATCGG-1"}],"options":{"columns":{"min":{},"max":[10],"total":[8]},"rows":{"min":[10],"max":[10],"total":[6]},"pages":{}}}
  </script>
</div>

<!-- rnb-frame-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## 9. Save Processed Object

Save the fully annotated object to Box.


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
# Define output path - update this to your Box sync folder location
output_path <- "D:/Youssef Sibih/Seurat_Objects/oneoverf_combined_corrected_annotations.rds"

# Save the object
saveRDS(obj, file = output_path)

print(paste("Object saved to:", output_path))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiT2JqZWN0IHNhdmVkIHRvOiBEOi9Zb3Vzc2VmIFNpYmloL1NldXJhdF9PYmplY3RzL29uZW92ZXJmX2NvbWJpbmVkX2NvcnJlY3RlZF9hbm5vdGF0aW9ucy5yZHNcIlxuIn0= -->

```
[1] "Object saved to: D:/Youssef Sibih/Seurat_Objects/oneoverf_combined_corrected_annotations.rds"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin  -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxucHJpbnQocGFzdGUoXCJGaWxlIHNpemU6XCIsIHJvdW5kKGZpbGUuaW5mbyhvdXRwdXRfcGF0aCkkc2l6ZSAvIDFlOSwgMiksIFwiR0JcIikpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
print(paste("File size:", round(file.info(output_path)$size / 1e9, 2), "GB"))
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiWzFdIFwiRmlsZSBzaXplOiAxNTMuNjcgR0JcIlxuIn0= -->

```
[1] "File size: 153.67 GB"
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->
